positive: Minimalist abstract forest scene, featuring stylized silhouettes of oak and birch trees against a gradient twilight sky. The overall composition is circular and centered, creating a medallion effect. Use highly contrasted, deep indigo blues and burnt orange tones, reminiscent of negative film photography. The foreground should have clean, sharp lines and negative space is paramount. The style should evoke Art Deco geometry mixed with natural forms, suitable for high-quality, wearable merchandise print. Vector-illustration quality, highly symmetrical, dramatic backlighting, clean edges, graphic novel style.
negative: text, logo, trademark, watermark, copyright, blurry, smudge, grain, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, realistic photography, bokeh, gradient skin, messy lines
